allow: Bash(npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | grep -E "\\\(auth\\\)/\(login|consent|terms|privacy\)" || echo "No errors in auth pages")
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to activate' && sleep 1 && screencapture -x /tmp/splash-chrome.png)
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to set URL of active tab of front window to "http://localhost:3001/"')
Bash(osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to activate' && sleep 2 && screencapture -x /tmp/splash-page2.png)

Bash(osascript -e '
tell application "WhatsApp" to set miniaturized of every window to true
delay 0.5
tell application "Google Chrome"
  activate
  delay 0.5
  set URL of active tab of front window to "http://localhost:3001/"
end tell
delay 2
' && screencapture -x /tmp/splash-page3.png)

Bash(osascript -e '
tell application "System Events"
  set visible of process "WhatsApp" to false
end tell
delay 0.5
tell application "Google Chrome"
  activate
end tell
delay 2
' && screencapture -x /tmp/splash-page3.png)
Bash(npx tsc --noEmit --pretty src/contexts/TeamContext.tsx src/app/coach/layout.tsx src/app/coach/home/page.tsx 2>&1 | head -80)
Bash(npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | grep -E "squad" || echo "No errors in squad files")
Bash(npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | grep -i "watch" || echo "No errors related to watch page")

Bash(python3 -c "
with open\('src/app/coach/watch/page.tsx', 'r'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# Check brace balance around the problematic area
for i in range\(975, 1235\):
    line = lines[i]
    opens = line.count\('{'\) - line.count\('}'\)
    closes = line.count\('\('\) - line.count\('\)'\)
    angles_open = 0
    if opens != 0 or closes != 0:
        print\(f'L{i+1}: opens={opens} closes={closes} | {line.rstrip\(\)[:80]}'\)
")

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
with open\('src/app/coach/watch/page.tsx', 'r'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

for i in range\(975, 1235\):
    line = lines[i]
    opens = line.count\('{'\) - line.count\('}'\)
    parens = line.count\('\('\) - line.count\('\)'\)
    if opens != 0 or parens != 0:
        print\(f'L{i+1}: braces={opens:+d} parens={parens:+d} | {line.rstrip\(\)[:100]}'\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
with open\('src/app/coach/watch/page.tsx', 'r'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

brace_total = 0
paren_total = 0
for i in range\(1005, 1230\):
    line = lines[i]
    brace_total += line.count\('{'\) - line.count\('}'\)
    paren_total += line.count\('\('\) - line.count\('\)'\)
    if i+1 in [1006, 1013, 1014, 1119, 1120, 1199, 1226, 1227, 1228, 1229]:
        print\(f'L{i+1}: brace_running={brace_total:+d} paren_running={paren_total:+d} | {line.rstrip\(\)[:100]}'\)
PYEOF)
